    fn __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_large_array_tuple();

const OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[258];

    input_buffer_sizes: INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES,
    input_buffer_alignments: INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS,
    output_buffer_sizes: OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES,
    output_buffer_alignments: OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS,

        offset: 134,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 136,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 138,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 140,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 142,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 144,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 146,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 148,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 150,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 152,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 154,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 156,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 158,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 160,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 162,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 164,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 166,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 168,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 170,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 172,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 174,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 176,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 178,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 180,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 182,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 184,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 186,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 188,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 190,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 192,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 194,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 196,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 198,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 200,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 202,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 204,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 206,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 208,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 210,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 212,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 214,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 216,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 218,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 220,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 222,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 224,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 226,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 228,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 230,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 232,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 234,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 236,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 238,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 240,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 242,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 244,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 246,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 248,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 250,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 252,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 254,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 256,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
];
#[allow(clippy::deref_addrof, clippy::explicit_auto_deref, clippy::identity_op)]
fn encode_input_0(_value: &Input0, dst: &mut [u8]) {
    debug_assert_eq!(dst.len(), 258);
    dst.fill(0);
    write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize], &((_value).field0).to_ne_bytes());
    for index_0 in 0..128 {
        write_leaf_element(
            dst,
            &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 1 + index_0],
            &(((_value).field1)[index_0]).to_ne_bytes(),
        );
    }
    debug_assert_eq!(INPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 129);
}
#[allow(clippy::identity_op, clippy::let_and_return)]
fn decode_output_0(src: &[u8]) -> Output {
    debug_assert_eq!(src.len(), 258);
    let output: Output = Output {
        field0: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
            read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize], &mut dst_bytes);
            let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        },
        field1: std::array::from_fn(|index_0| {
            {
                let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 2];
                read_leaf_element(
                    src,
                    &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 1 + index_0],
                    &mut dst_bytes,
                );
                let decoded = u16::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
                decoded
            }
        }),
    };
    debug_assert_eq!(OUTPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 129);
    output
}
/// Reusable runner for the generated standalone AOT entrypoint.
///
/// A runner caches the standalone ABI buffers; create one runner per
/// concurrent caller instead of sharing it across threads.
pub struct Runner {
    inner: StandaloneRunner,
}
impl Runner {
    /// Creates a reusable runner for the generated standalone entrypoint.
    ///
    /// # Errors
    ///
    /// Returns an error if the standalone artifact metadata cannot initialize
    /// the ABI buffers required by the generated entrypoint.
    pub fn new() -> Result<Self, AotError> {
        Ok(Self {
            inner: unsafe {
                StandaloneRunner::new(
                    &ARTIFACT_METADATA,
                    __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_large_array_tuple as *const (),
                    &RUNNER_LAYOUT,
                )?
            },
        })
    }
    /// Runs the entrypoint and returns the output together with assertion
    /// events.
    ///
    /// # Errors
    ///
    /// Returns an error if standalone ABI buffer initialization or output
    /// decoding fails.
    pub fn run_with_events(
        &mut self,
        input: &Input0,
    ) -> Result<AotRunResult<Output>, AotError> {
        encode_input_0(input, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        self.inner.run_raw();
        Ok(AotRunResult {
            output: decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0)),
            assert_messages: self.inner.assert_messages().to_vec(),
        })
    }
    /// Runs the entrypoint and returns only the decoded output value.
    ///
    /// # Errors
    ///
    /// Returns an error if output decoding fails or an XLS assertion fires.
    pub fn run(&mut self, input: &Input0) -> Result<Output, AotError> {
        encode_input_0(input, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        self.inner.run_raw();
        if let Some(first_assertion) = self.inner.assert_messages().first() {
            return Err(AotError(format!("XLS assertion failed: {first_assertion}")));
        }
        Ok(decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0)))
    }
}
/// Creates a reusable runner for the generated standalone entrypoint.
pub fn new_runner() -> Result<Runner, AotError> {
    Runner::new()
}
